description_long: This object depicts a humanoid figure with exaggerated, distorted proportions, most notably extremely elongated arms or appendages that stretch outward in a dramatic, wing-like fashion. The figure has a slender build, with visible musculature and a defined waist, and is dressed in fitted pants and a sleeveless top. The head features short, textured hair and a neutral facial expression. The arms or extensions appear to be fused with the upper torso, creating an unnatural, almost surreal silhouette. The legs are bent and positioned as if the figure is crouching or preparing to leap. The overall appearance is highly stylized and abstract, deviating significantly from typical human anatomy.
description: A stylized humanoid figure with extremely elongated, wing-like arms and a crouched posture, dressed in fitted urban clothing. The form is highly distorted and abstract, with exaggerated proportions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's face, chest, and the dramatic outward stretch of the elongated arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the extreme length and curvature of the arms, as well as the bent legs and side profile of the head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the figure's back, and the full span of the extended arms.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the curvature of the arms and the crouched, dynamic posture of the legs.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless top and fitted pants with a belt
attribute_posture: crouching with arms dramatically extended outward
